name: Command Me Quiet
description:
Day 24. Superior/Subordinate

Kinktober Day 24

⚠️ Content Warning

This story contains depictions of panic attacks, trauma responses, PTSD, power-imbalance dynamics, and psychological dependency. Themes of control, disobedience, and emotional regulation through authority are present. While non-sexual, the narrative includes intense emotional intimacy and power reversal that may read as D/s-coded. Mentions of past violence, hostage trauma, and self-inflicted scratching are included. Reader discretion is advised.

I have been using my own Kinktober list! I have combined it with my Goretober list but will be posting separately for each! I will post twice daily, one for Goretober and one for Kinktober. Here is the link to the list!

You can be anything you want; human, demi-human, etc....

Picture is not mine but I would love to give credit to the original artist!

♡Requests are welcomed! Message me on discord at officialm1lf or leave a review for a request!
